message: Buenos días Julia! Just checking in on my dress — my wedding is May 9th and I'm getting a bit nervous. How is it coming along? Will we have time for the final fitting?
draft: Buenos días Valentina! Completely understand the nerves — but you're in great shape. Your dress is in the final alterations stage and looking beautiful. Your final fitting is already booked for April 18th, which gives us plenty of time before May 9th. See you then! 🤍
